errors.name: InvalidArgs
errors.msg: CreateListing args could not be decoded.

errors.name: InvalidOwner
errors.msg: Owner pubkey is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidMinPrice
errors.msg: Minimum price must be greater than zero.

errors.name: InvalidTokenAmount
errors.msg: Token amount must be greater than zero.

errors.name: InvalidAssetType
errors.msg: Asset type is unsupported.

errors.name: InvalidTokenMint
errors.msg: Token mint pubkey is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidVestingSourceProgram
errors.msg: Vesting source program pubkey is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidVestingSourcePosition
errors.msg: Vesting source position pubkey is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidVestingSchedule
errors.msg: Vesting schedule is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidUnlockedAmount
errors.msg: Unlocked amount exceeds token amount.

errors.name: InvalidClaimedAmount
errors.msg: Claimed amount exceeds token amount.

errors.name: InvalidPrivateBuyer
errors.msg: Private buyer pubkey is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidTransferRestrictionMode
errors.msg: Transfer restriction mode is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidSettlementMode
errors.msg: Settlement mode is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidRequiredSettlementAttestor
errors.msg: Required settlement attestor pubkey is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidRequiredConsentAuthority
errors.msg: Required consent authority pubkey is invalid.

errors.name: OwnerNotSigner
errors.msg: Signer does not match the listing owner.

errors.name: ListingAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Listing has already been initialised for this entity.

errors.name: MissingTokenEscrowAccounts
errors.msg: Token escrow accounts are required when a token mint is supplied.

errors.name: InvalidTokenProgram
errors.msg: Token program account is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidSellerTokenAccount
errors.msg: Seller token account does not match the listing owner and mint.

errors.name: InvalidEscrowTokenAccount
errors.msg: Escrow token account does not match the listing escrow authority and mint.
